author: lOrm
content: #608 closed. Added WebFetchConfig in src/config/webfetch.rs with distillation_enabled (default off for back-compat), max_distillation_bytes (default 100_000 = CC's MAX_MARKDOWN_LENGTH pinned by test), distillation_provider, distillation_model. truncate_for_distillation helper enforces char-boundary truncation. 5 unit tests pin: default posture, char-boundary truncate, under-cap no-op, yaml round-trip, CC constant equality. Runtime hook (small-model dispatch in tools/web.rs) awaits a separate landing of the secondary-model invocation path; the config surface is complete.
